releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
# Linking images and PDFs without transclusion

Users can now link to an image or PDF without transcluding it. 
Example: `[[myimage.png]]` and `[[mydocument.pdf]]` will now link to that file. 
Hover previews will also work for both file types. 

You need to update both the template and the plugin for this to work.

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
Re-release.
Something wrong happened in the last release causing Obsidian to not be able to update the plugin. Releasing a new version to fix that.

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
## Only upload images once
Fix a bug where images in notes would be re-uploaded for every publish, regardless of them being changed or not. In this release the plugin will only upload the image if it has changed from whatever is already published. Should make re-publishing notes with lots of images be must faster.

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: Fix bug where PDFs in notes, and images in canvases would appear as deleted in Publication Center.

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: Add support for youtube links being embedded in canvases, and for `![[youtub link]]` in normal notes to be embedded.

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: Added support for advanced canvas' text align feature for text boxes

You can now publish your canvas. 

See https://dg-docs.ole.dev/features/#canvas

releases.description: You can now set your own custom logo under appearance settings

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: New UI text setting for search preview

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
You can now override the UI texts such as "Search" "Pages mentioning this page" etc from the plugin. Remember to update to the latest version of the template.

Bonus: The site updater has gotten a UI refresh.

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
# UI Enhancements
The appearance settings should now look cleaner, and the theme selector has been upgraded to show screenshots of the available themes. 

Also, if any appeareance settings is changed on the site somewhere other than in the Obsidian app, this will be reflected in the settings in Obsidian.

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: A hickup in the last release so it doesn't appear in Obsidian as an update. Hopefully this release fixes that.

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
# PDF Support
Thanks to @MostlyKIGuess, the plugin now supports embedded PDFs. Either `![[mypdf.pdf]]`, `![](mypdf.pdf)` or `![](https://example.com/document.pdf)` will work. 

## What's Changed
* PDF Extension by @MostlyKIGuess in https://github.com/oleeskild/obsidian-digital-garden/pull/691

## New Contributors
* @MostlyKIGuess made their first contribution in https://github.com/oleeskild/obsidian-digital-garden/pull/691

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/oleeskild/obsidian-digital-garden/compare/2.61.1...2.62.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
# 🐞 More forgiving dataview parsing
If you write your dataview code blocks with spaces between ``` and dataview, the plugin should will now pick it up. Previously no spaces was allowed

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
# Quality Of Life Improvements

## Improved GitHub Authentication
  - Better error messages for connection issues (invalid token, repo not found, missing
  permissions)
  - Visual loading indicator while checking connection
  - Replaced emoji indicators with icons and always-visible status text

## Status Bar Improvements
  - Fixed duplicate status bars when triggering publish multiple times

## Publication Center
  - Added external link to quickly open your GitHub repository or Forestry dashboard

## Global Note Settings Overhaul
  - Settings now load from your live site when opening the modal
  - Added "Apply" button to batch upload all changes at once
  - Clear indicator showing unsaved changes
  - Button disabled when no changes have been made
  - No longer uploads on every toggle change

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: * Bugfix: If forestry is selected, we don't need github settings

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Better frontmatter handling when using the frontmatter changing commands such as add publish flag.
* New command for adding home note tag. 
* Introduction of a new publishing platform, [forestry.md ](https://forestry.md), as a less technical alternative to the existing github/vercel workflow. Currently invite-only. More info on this in the discord in the coming weeks. 


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/oleeskild/obsidian-digital-garden/compare/2.59.2...2.60.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
# Hotfix 🐞
Hotfix for #578
When opening publication center, an error could occur if any of the user's uploaded image contained a percent sign. This is now fixed.
releases.name: Release 2.58.1

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
## New: Warning for Multiple Home Pages

You'll now see a warning in the Publication Center if you have multiple notes marked as home pages (`dg-home: true`), as this will fail the build in Vercel/Netlify/etc.

### What's New
- Clear warning when multiple notes are set as home page
- Shows exactly which files need to be fixed
- Helps prevent builds in your digital garden

### How to Use
Just open the Publication Center as usual - if any issues are found, you'll see a warning box at the top showing which files need attention. Only one note should be marked as your home page.

You can still publish your notes while you decide which note should be your home page.

![CleanShot 2025-02-04 at 15 01 45@2x](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/8bf9aecd-2d1f-452b-b933-7fed6e1bc024)


## Misc
Set the default theme to be Red Graphite, instead of using a default theme that must be maintained.

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: Hotfix for #605

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Publish multiple files in one commits by @oleeskild in https://github.com/oleeskild/obsidian-digital-garden/pull/588
   * Each deleted note still uses one commit per deletion. I'm unable to get batch deletion working. I'll get back to that at a later point. The mass publish of changed and new notes is working as expected. 
* fix: don't replace block IDs in codeblocks by @tyler-dot-earth in https://github.com/oleeskild/obsidian-digital-garden/pull/596

## New Contributors
* @tyler-dot-earth made their first contribution in https://github.com/oleeskild/obsidian-digital-garden/pull/596

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/oleeskild/obsidian-digital-garden/compare/2.56.2...2.57.1

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
# Multiple files in one commit 🎉 
This release implements the most requested feature so far: putting multiple files in one commit. This means that publishing many files at once, will only trigger one deploy in Vercel/Netlify/etc. 
At most, the plugin will do two commits, one for changed/new files and another one for deleted files. 

Additionally the performance of publishing has increased dramatically, as the file upload are now done in parallel. 

This closes
#115 
#475 
#320 

# Beta
I'm releasing this as a beta version to start with. If you have any feedback, please let me know in the [Discord](https://discord.gg/UsPH74nEVS)!
You can install the beta automatically by using [BRAT](https://tfthacker.com/BRAT).
releases.name: Beta release 2.57.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
🐞 Fix for dg-path
When using the dg-path, the dg-permalink would be set to blank, making the site crash in Vercel/Netlify/etc . This release should fix that.
releases.name: Release 2.56.2

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
# 🐞 Deleting multiple files fix
There has been a bug where deleting multiple files would seem to work in the publication center, but in reality, only a few files got deleted. This release should fix that! 

This fix closes these issues:
#538, #512
releases.name: Release 2.56.1

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
# Allow using full resolution images 🌄
A new setting is added under Appearance settings that allows turning on full resolution images, instead of the default where they are compressed for better performance

You also need to update the template for this to work.
releases.name: Release 2.56.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
# 🐞 Header transclusion fix
Transcluding a header with special character, such as "?" and ":", would previously transclude the entire page. This release fixes that, and only transcludes the block below the header as expected.

Thanks to @uroybd for fixing this (PR: #533 )
releases.name: Release 2.55.1

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
## Style settings improvements
- Some style settings (class toggles and selections) would not work in previous version. This version fixes that. The style settings should now be applied as expected to your site. (You also need to update the template for this to work)

## 🐞 Bug squasing
- Some SVGs that contained linebreaks between the inner tags would break the entire page it was on. This has now been fixed (a side effect is that all your notes with transcluded SVGs will show up as changed in the publication center, because the plugin is now removing any linebreaks)
- Live preview of rewrite rules now works again
releases.name: Release 2.55.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
## 🐛 Bug squashing
Setting alt attributes on internal images, i.e. `![[myimage.png|center]]` should now work. This is used in themes like ITS to apply styling to images. 
Closes #469
releases.name: Release 2.54.1

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
## 🔡 New Language setting
In the appearance settings there is now a new setting allowing you to specify the main language of your site. This is used to set the <html lang=""> of your site, which is used to assist browser and search engines.

You also need to update the template for this to work.

Thanks to @stalegjelsten for implementing this (PR #473)
releases.name: Release 2.54.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
## Bug squashing 🐞
Users that had branches not named `main` for their garden would have problems with publication center loading forever. This release fixes that.
releases.name: Release 2.53.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
## iOS/Android fix 📱
* This release fixes the issues with loading the plugin on mobile. (PR #478)

Thanks to @julesvirallinen and discord user `rik` for helping fix this 💪
releases.name: Release 2.52.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
## Dataview JS improvements
Large dataviews that previously wouldn't render should now work. 
Also, if you had any issues with inline dataview js not showing up, this release should fix that

Remember to also update the template, as this contains changes to better support dataview styles.
releases.name: Release 2.51.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
## Dataview improvements
* Dataview inline queries that wouldn't work previously should now work as expected (it would fail if you had any whitespace between the query and the opening character. I.e. = this.name instead of =this.name.)
* Dataview queries inside callouts should now work as expected

## Performance
* Updating the template should be significantly faster. You should also clearly see if you need to update or not.
* Updating the settings will no longer result in an empty favicon update commit

## Other
* The plugin now supports images in webp format
releases.name: Release 2.50.5

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
## Beta release
* Add logging to mobile version
releases.name: Release 2.50.4

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
## Beta release
* Another attempt at fixing the mobile version
releases.name: Release 2.50.3

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
## Beta release
* The last release did not fix the iOS and Android problems. Hopefully this does.
releases.name: Release 2.50.2

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
## Beta release
* Image deletion should now work better
* Hopefully the plugin should work on iOS and Android again🤞
releases.name: Release 2.50.1

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
# Beta release
The plugin has undergone major refactorings and rewrites (thanks to @julesvirallinen). Because of this, this release is currently released as a Beta version. It will not be visible in the community plugin page in Obsidian. You will need the "BRAT" plugin installed in order to try it out.

## New Features.
In addition to the big rewrite, there are also some bugfixes and new features in this release:
* Updating the template should be significantly faster. You should also clearly see if you need to update or not.
* Dataview inline queries that wouldn't work previously should now work as expected (it would fail if you had any whitespace between the query and the opening character. I.e. `= this.name` instead of `=this.name`.)
* Updating the settings will no longer result in an empty favicon update commit
* The plugin now supports images in webp format
* Invalid regex in the custom filters will no longer crash the entire plugin
releases.name: Release 2.50.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
## Bug squashing 🐞
Previously, if any of your custom filters contained an invalid regex, it would crash the plugin. Now we will simply skip it, and notify the user about it.
releases.name: Release 2.49.1

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
# Better theme support
Some themes allow you to customize images and callouts with metadata after a "|" symbol. For example this in the ITS theme:
> [!infobox|wikipedia]
![[image.png|banner|200]]

This release adds support for this syntax. You also need to [update the template](https://dg-docs.ole.dev/getting-started/06-updating-the-template/) for this to work properly.
PR: #443 

# Delete unused images
Images that are no longer used should now be deleted
PR: #427 

## Better performance
Some changes have been done to make various actions faster in some curcumstances. See PRs for details.
PRs: 
#433 
#434 
#441

## Better dev experience
Changes that have enhanced the developer experience
PRs: 
#435 
#442
releases.name: Release 2.49.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
## New commands (PR #414 by @julesvirallinen  )
Two new commands have been introduced
* Remove publish flag
* Toggle publication status

## Rewrite rules enhancement (PR #422 by @julesvirallinen)
The rewrite rules UI will now show a live preview of what notes will be affected when modifying the rules
![CleanShot 2023-09-24 at 19 09 36](https://github.com/oleeskild/obsidian-digital-garden/assets/4622905/5eb717b8-640c-4ce6-8189-ee170aefc7fd)

## Settings feedback
Changing settings should now be a bit more user friendly. Changing default note settings should now show a notice when saving, and when they are successfully changed. Additionally the save button in the appearance setting is now under every appearance category, which hopefully should make it easier to understand that the button needs to be clicked to save changed settings.

## Maintenance
* The code base have yet again undergone some major refactors, mostly implemented by @julesvirallinen 🙌
releases.name: Release 2.48.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
# New Features ✨
* A brand new publication center featuring a filetree, checkboxes and a diff view for changed notes #412
## Filetree
![CleanShot 2023-09-20 at 21 40 33@2x](https://github.com/oleeskild/obsidian-digital-garden/assets/6201338/919639ed-c725-44d2-8fbc-fe407c59fdc7)
## Diff view
![CleanShot 2023-09-20 at 21 40 51@2x](https://github.com/oleeskild/obsidian-digital-garden/assets/6201338/21945d2c-6e51-4d68-b5b8-87ab8beaa729)
## Publishing view
![CleanShot 2023-09-20 at 21 41 03@2x](https://github.com/oleeskild/obsidian-digital-garden/assets/6201338/56b4b29c-5000-425d-a6d6-2222737932ef)

 
* Indication on whether your github config is correct or not #404 (PR by @julesvirallinen)
![CleanShot 2023-09-16 at 20 43 31](https://github.com/oleeskild/obsidian-digital-garden/assets/4622905/338b274a-c9df-4dd7-a2c1-8e6f5060ff7f)

## Maintenance
* The project has undergone some major improvements regarding types, vault testing, developer experience and structure. Massive thanks to @julesvirallinen for creating a bunch of PRs making these improvements!
releases.name: Release 2.47.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
## New Features ✨
* Tags in frontmatter that is separated by commas is now treated as a list #366 
* There is now a live preview in the path rewrite modal, allowing you to test your rules manually #374 
* Support "blank" paths in rewrite rules. Writing "My Garden:" will now rewrite all the notes in that folder to be under the root of the website, i.e. "https://example.com/my-note"  #379 

## Squashed bugs 🐞
* Links to transcluded content now takes the "dg-permalink" attribute into account  #342 
* Block references is no longer displayed in transcluded content #362 

## Maintenance 🧑‍🔧
* The project now has some basic unit tests #375 


Thanks to the following users for their contribution 🎉
@uroybd , @jpoles1 , @julesvirallinen
releases.name: Release 2.46.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
# 🔧 SVG fix
Scaled ranscluded SVGs, i.e. `![[example.svg|500]]` could lead to an entire page breaking, if it contained an empty style tag. This release fixes that (This partly fixes #318)
releases.name: Release 2.45.2

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: * The content filter now applies to transcluded content as well. (Thanks to  @davidkopp for fixing this in #316)
releases.name: Release 2.45.1

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
# 📝 Content filtering
A new setting has been added under the "Advanced" section, allowing you to specify arbitrary regex patterns and their replacement. Using this allows you to filter your content however you want before publishing. (Big thanks to @zcysxy for implementing this in #304 🎉 ) 

Documentation for this will be added in the docs, but for now refer to #304 for an overview of how to use it.
releases.name: Release 2.45.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
# 👨‍💻 UI Enhancements
The UI should be a bit easier to navigate now, and more user friendly. Especially for new users. (Thanks to @amperag for the suggestions #268)

# 🎨 Content classes to note body
It is now possible to specify css classes you want to add to a note's body class. (PR by @uroybd #277). This requires the latest version of the template as well. See https://dg-docs.ole.dev/advanced/note-specific-settings/#body-classes and https://dg-docs.ole.dev/getting-started/04-appearance-settings/#css-settings for more info.
releases.name: Release 2.44.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: * The "Hide note in graph" functionality was lost in a merge conflict, and didn't get released as part of version 2.43.1. This version adds it back in.
releases.name: Release 2.43.1

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
# Filetree enhancements 🌳
* A new option has been added to rewrite your vault paths, to other file paths in your garden. For example: If you want you vault folder named "Personal/Journal" to just be "Journal" in the garden, you can now do that (#239  by @uroybd )
* Pinned Notes: If you add the "dg-pinned: true" property to the frontmatter of a note, it will be pinned to the top of the folder it is in (#244 by @uroybd)

# Graph enhancements 📈
* Hide note in graph: If you add the "dg-hide-in-graph: true" property to the frontmatter of a note, it will be hidden from the graph view. (#245 by @uroybd)

# Publication center enhancement 🗞️
* Note count will now show next to each section in the publication center view
releases.name: Release 2.43.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: * Fix bug where images on a path containing a space could cause it not to render (#226)
releases.name: Release 2.42.2

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: * Fix bug where you would get an error if you didn't have dataview enabled
releases.name: Release 2.42.1

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: * Added support for inline dataview, inline dataview js and dataview js 🎉
releases.name: Release 2.42.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: * Fix bug where several commands stopped working after the last version
releases.name: Release 2.41.1

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
# Style Settings Support 🎨
The Digital Garden now supports applying your style settings set with the style settings plugin. Instructions on how to use it described [here](https://dg-docs.ole.dev/getting-started/04-appearance-settings/#style-settings-plugin)

You also need the latest version of the template for this to work.
releases.name: Release 2.41.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: * Adds new command "Quick Publish And Share Note". This will add a publish flag, publish the note and copy the URL of currently active note. (Closes #209)
releases.name: Release 2.40.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
* Add support for note icons on backlinks (#221 by @uroybd)
* Add new front matter value, dg-hide, for hiding a note from the filetree (#228 by @uroybd)

You will need the latest version of the template for these settings to work.
releases.name: Release 2.39.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: * Add support for enabling timestamps for created and updated times for notes. It can be configured in the Digital Garden appearance settings.  (#200 by @uroybd)
releases.name: Release 2.38.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
* New settings are added for easily setting custom note icons. This is documented [here](https://dg-docs.ole.dev/getting-started/04-appearance-settings/#note-icon-settings) and [here](https://dg-docs.ole.dev/advanced/note-specific-settings/#note-icons). This should make it easy to show things like note maturity in your garden. You'll need the latest version of the template for this to work. 

Thanks to @uroybd for implementing this 🎉
releases.name: Release 2.37.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
* Images are now uploaded in their own "/src/site/img/user" folder, and linked to from the note, instead of embedded right into the note. This should lead to much better overall performance on pages with images on them. (Implemented by @uroybd 🎉 )
* You now get immediate feedback when using the "Publish Multiple notes" command, and more accurate info about what's going on
* The cdn link to Excalidraw has been switched to jsdelivr, as the previously used unpkg has had some performance issues lately.
releases.name: Release 2.36.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: * Removed Netlify reference (Closes #185)
releases.name: Release 2.35.6

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: * Fix bug where you would need to explicitly set a theme after installing the plugin for other settings to work
releases.name: Release 2.35.5

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
* Fix a bug where the following syntax in frontmatter would break the site: (#99)
```
tags:
 - []
```
releases.name: Release 2.35.4

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: * Fix issue where publication center wouldn't work if the branch name of the garden in GitHub was something different than "main"  (Closes  #171)
releases.name: Release 2.35.3

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
# Excalidraw enhancements

* Fix issues that occured when drawings were in blockquotes
* Add support for comressed drawings

Huge thanks to @Luke-zhang-04 for implementing this 🎉
releases.name: Release 2.35.2

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: Fixes a bug where embedded images using the `![](image%20path.png)` syntax would not work if the path had any spaces in it. (This fixes [DigitalGarden PR 37](https://github.com/oleeskild/digitalgarden/issues/37))
releases.name: Release 2.35.1

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: The favicon setting now shows a searchable dropdown menu with all svg files in the vault, to make it easier to input the correct file path.
releases.name: Release 2.35.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: Previously you would get a build error when updating the template if any files had changed, and you hadn't updated to the latest plugin version first. This release fixes this, so that you are no longer dependent on having the latest plugin version when updating the template.
releases.name: Release 2.34.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
# Tag support
A new setting has been added, allowing you to show tags from your frontmatter at the top of a note.
If search is enabled, clicking a tag will bring up a search, showing all notes with the same tag. 
Note that you will need to update the template as well for this to work.

Huge thanks to @uroybd for doing most of the work on this
releases.name: Release 2.33.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
# Support metatags
Adding a dg-meta-tag with key-value pairs as children to a note will now add those values as meta tags in your header.
Note that you also need to [update the template](https://dg-docs.netlify.app/getting-started/06-updating-the-template/) to the latest version for this to work .

Example:
```
dg-meta-tags:
 description: "some description"
 "og:image": "https://imagelink...."
```

Thanks to @uroybd for the implementation
releases.name: Release 2.32.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
# Support title attribute
Added support for setting the "title" attribute in frontmatter. 
Example:
```
---
title: Overview page
dg-publish: true
--- 
```

The filename is still used as default, but the title will be used if available. 

Again, thanks to @uroybd for the implementation.
releases.name: Release 2.31.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
# Transclusion links
* Transclusions will now link to the transcluded note if that note has been published. If only a block was transcluded, the link will lead to the actual block. Not ethat you need to update the template after updating the plugin for this to work.  

Thanks to @uroybd for implementing this feature. 🎉
releases.name: Release 2.30.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
* Adds support transcluding blocks (i.e. ![[My Note#^someid]])
* Fix bug where transcluding by header would not include subheaders in that block

Huge thanks to @uroybd for implementing this.
releases.name: Release 2.29.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: * Small patch to fix issue where the template update would miss a file.
releases.name: Release 2.28.1

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
# Link preview
* Add a new option to enable link previews. Enabling this will show a preview window when hovering a link to another note. Remember to also update the template to be able to enable this feature.
releases.name: Release 2.28.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
# Option to disable URL slugging
A new setting is introduced in this release, which let's users choose to diable slugification of URLs. It is enabled by default. Turning this setting off should solve the URL generation issue for people having note titles with non-English characters. (This solves #114, #46, #74, #125. Thanks to @Mowd for suggesting this feature as a solution to the Chinese characters problem.)
releases.name: Release 2.27.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
# Table Of Content support
This release adds support for enabling a table of content in the right sidebar. 
Make sure to[ update the template](https://dg-docs.ole.dev/getting-started/06-updating-the-template/) to the latest version after updating the plugin for this to work. (This closes #73 and #118)
releases.name: Release 2.26.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: * Adds support for resizing SVGs with the `![name|200](my.svg)` syntax. This solves the second part of https://github.com/oleeskild/obsidian-digital-garden/issues/58
releases.name: Release. 2.25.1

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: * Adds support for resizing SVGs with the pipe syntax (`![[myfile.svg|400]]`). This solves #58
releases.name: Release 2.25.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: * The Base URL setting will now add that setting to the site, so that it can be used for generating a proper sitemap.xml with a base url. (Solves #105)
releases.name: Release 2.24.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: * Fixed a bug where obsidian comments containing codefences would break the removal the commented sections. (#112)
releases.name: Release 2.23.4

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: * A sitemap was recently added to the template. This update makes that new file visible to the plugin when doing a template update.
releases.name: Release 2.23.3

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: * After obsidian changed how they handle themes in version 1.0, some themes would break, and cause a build error. This version should fix that, supporting both legacy and newer themes.
releases.name: Release 2.23.2

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: * Fixes #97 where themes that were on a branch named something else than "master" would cause a build error. If you have experienced this, changing the theme to something else, before changing back to what you originally had should fix the issue.
releases.name: Release 2.23.1

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
* This release adds support for search. You can enable it in Obisidian by going to Settings > Digital Garden > Note Settings > "Enable Search". Remember to first update the plugin to version 2.23.0, then the template for this to work. 
* The "Show Home Link" option now toggles the navigation bar that is added on top of each page. 

Huge thanks to @shmuga who has done most of the heavy lifting regarding the search functionality.
releases.name: Release 2.23.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: * This version adds a new option for showing a navigation tree. It can be enabled in the Note settings. Please make sure you have the latest template version for this to work properly
releases.name: Release 2.22.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
This version fixes an issue where header links in tables would not render properly. 
Thanks to @zcysxy for creating PR #82 and fixing this!
releases.name: Release 2.21.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
This releases changes how the plugin handles global note settings. Previously you'd have to publish all your notes again if you changed one of the settings, as it was applied to the note upon publish.
Now all default settings are immediately set in the repo instead.
This means that changing a global setting no longer demands republishing of every note, and instead applies globally immediately when changed.

You'll need version at least version 1.18.0 of the template for this to work.
releases.name: Release 2.20.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
Transcluding part of a file using the ![[My Note#Some Header]] syntax is now supported. (This closes  #54)

Thanks to @shmuga for making a contribution (#78), adding this functionality.
releases.name: Release 2.19.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: Add new setting for showing note title inline
releases.name: Release 2.18.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
# Backlinks and local graph support

Added support for local graph and backlinks in notes.
You'll need the latest version of the [digitalgarden template](https://github.com/oleeskild/digitalgarden/releases/tag/1.15.0) for this to work. 
The template can be updated via obsidian by going to "Settings > Digital Garden > Site Template > Manage site template > Create PR"

It can be enabled in frontmatter on a per-note basis by specifying either one of these properties:
```
---
dg-show-backlinks: true
dg-show-local-graph: true
---
```

To enable it by default on all notes go to "Setting > Digital Garden > Note Settings > Edit" and check the appropriate checkboxes.
releases.name: Release 2.17.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
This version adds a new command: Add publish flag. 
This should make it easier to quickly publish a file, not having to manually write the publish flag in the frontmatter.
releases.name: Release 2.16.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
Users can now toggle off the ribbon icon in settings. Note that you will need to reload obsidian for these changes to take effect. 

This closes [Issue 70](https://github.com/oleeskild/obsidian-digital-garden/issues/70).
releases.name: Release 2.15.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
# Dataview Support (!)

This version implements support for rendering dataview queries. You need at least version 0.5.39 of the Dataview plugin installed for this to work. 

## Usage
If a page contains a dataview code block, it should automatically be rendered correctly to the digital garden website.
Ex:
\`\`\`dataview
list where dg-publish=true
\`\`\`

**Note**: Because of a limitation in the dataview API, it does not yet support DataviewJS. This will be added in the future, when the dataview plugin adds support for it.

Huge thanks to @blacksmithgu for releasing the functionality for rendering markdown from a query in [version 0.5.39](https://github.com/blacksmithgu/obsidian-dataview/releases/tag/0.5.39), making this functionality possible.
releases.name: Release 2.14.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
Fix excalidraw rendering.

The excalidraw library just shipped a breaking change to their library, which in turn broke the rendering this plugin implements. 
This version fixes that so that it renders excalidraw correctly. Unfortunately all notes containing excalidrawings needs to be republished.
releases.name: Release 2.13.1

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
# JPG and SVG support
This release fixed #42 and adds support for embedded and transcluded jpg and svg files. 

The following syntax will now render an image when published:
![[myimage.jpg]]
!(image)[myimage.jpg)
![[myvector.svg]]
!(vector)[myvector.svg)
releases.name: Release 2.13.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: This release fixes #52: There was an issue where a code block containing the syntax for an obsidian comment (/%%.*%%/g) would mess up the note by removing what it wrongly assumed to be a comment.
releases.name: Release 2.12.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
The plugin now removes [Obsidian comments](https://help.obsidian.md/How+to/Format+your+notes) before publishing the note. 
Thanks to @vanadium23 for implementing this feature.
releases.name: Release 2.11.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
* Add support for rendering transclusions within transclusions (up to 4 levels deep) #40 
* Add support for transcluded images with format `![](image.png)` #42
releases.name: Release 2.10.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
* Better handling of wikilink-like text that should not be rendered as links. 
* Fixes #40
releases.name: Release 2.9.3

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: Fixed bug where frontmatter data would be included when embedding an excalidraw file.
releases.name: Release 2.9.2

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
# Features
**Modifying default settings:** You can now modify default note settings to be what fits you best. Modifying the settings per note via frontmatter is still supported, allowing you to also set settings on a per-note basis.
Allow dg-publish in excalidraw (#36)
Add setting to allow passing frontmatter through to template (#33)

# Bugfixes
Do not update favicon if it hasn't changed (#32)
Links to non-existent files will now be converted to a link.
releases.name: Release 2.9.1

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
This release fixes bug where double square brackets inside a code fence was treated as a link.
Thanks to @meleu for reporting this issue (#25)
releases.name: Release 2.8.5

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
Fixes issue where any Markdown formatted content appearing in the first line of a tranclusion would not be properly formatted. 
Thanks to @phillipmorg for reporting this issue in PR #23
releases.name: Release 2.8.4

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: Themes in appearance settings are now sorted alphabetically.
releases.name: Release 2.8.3

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
# Better home note URL copy
This release changes the behavior of the copy garden URL when the home note is active. Instead of copying the full note URL, it copies the the root of the site URL
releases.name: Release 2.8.2

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
# Better frontmatter handling
This release fixes a bug where frontmatter data that contained whitespace before it wouldn't work properly. Your frontmatter data in your note may now contain whitespace before it's defined.

I.e. like this:
```

---
dg-pubilsh: true
---
```
releases.name: Release 2.8.1

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
# Header link support
Add support for linking to header in another note by using syntax [[Some Note#Some Header]].

Note: Currently it does not support linking into nested header like so [[Some Note#Heading#SubHeading]]. It will then link to the first "#Heading" part of the note.

**Remember to also update your garden site template for this to work**
releases.name: Release 2.8.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
# Release 2.7.0
**Remember to update to the latest template in the digital garden settings for new features to work properly**
## Themes
Added support for specifying any obsidian theme.
## Favicons
Added support for setting a favicon 
## Admonitions enhancements
Add support for all admonition types
Add support for setting admonition title
Add support for setting empty admonition title
## Markdown checkboxes
Added support for properly showing checkboxes 
## Note settings
Add support for using the 'dg-home-link: false' for hiding the home link in a note
releases.name: Release 2.7.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
* Fixed issue where notes in publication center were duplicated when closing before it was finished loading.
* Fixed issue where some files that weren't changed was marked as changed
releases.name: Release 2.6.2

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
* Fixed issue where some frontmatter data would cause the build to fail (#18 )
* Sort pull request history in descending order
releases.name: Release 2.6.1

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
* Added buttons to publish and delete notes in publication center
* Changed "publish multiple notes" command to only publish necessary files and delete deleted files. 
* Fixed bug where there would appear duplicates of files in publication center
releases.name: Release 2.6.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
# Added Excalidraw support
* Added support for embedded excalidraw (Remember to also update the site template for this to work properly. This can be done by using the "Create PR" button in the digital garden plugin settings)
* Fixed a bug where the publishmodal would not update file lists properly when opening it multiple times.
releases.name: Release 2.5.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
# Improved publication overview
This release aims to make it easier to understand what files are published, which has changed, been deleted and are yet to be published. 

* A new modal has been added for showing the publication status of your notes
* A progress indicator will now show in the bottom right corner whenever you publish multiple notes.
releases.name: Release 2.4.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: * Fixed bug where a transclusion containing a code block would mess up the note.
releases.name: Release 2.3.1

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: * Added support for specifying heading level in transclusions
releases.name: Release 2.3.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
# Better transclusion handling
* Remove any frontmatter from the transcluded documents
* Add option for customizing transclusion header
* Add docs in README about transclusion headers
releases.name: Release 2.2.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: * Fix issue where transcluded text and images stopped working after the latest update
releases.name: Release 2.1.3

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: * Fixed issue when saving settings
releases.name: Release 2.1.2

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: * Fixed permalink issues causing permalinks in nested notes to not work properly.
releases.name: Release 2.1.1

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
* Added support for nested links ([[Some Folder/SubFolder/Note]]). The links should now reflect the folder structure, instead of only using the title of the note. (dg-permalink can still be used for custom url-paths). 
* Added partial support for header links ([[Note#header]]). It won't link to the correct header, but it will link to the actual note and not to a 404 page. 
* 🪲 Squashed some bugs
releases.name: Release 2.1.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
- BREAKING CHANGE: All notes to be publish must now contain dg-publish: true in frontmatter.
- Added option to publish multiple notes at once. See the README for more information
releases.name: Release 2.0.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: * Fixed bug which caused the plugin to crash on mobile devices
releases.name: Release 1.4.1

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
* Added new plugin specific keywords for setting homepage and permalink attributes to avoid future conflicts
* Removed mandatory use of trailing slash in permalinks
releases.name: Release 1.4.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: * Added a new button in settings to automatically update the GitHub template repo with the latest template changes.
releases.name: Release 1.3.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
* Added support for setting permalinks for individual notes
* Slugify all note URLs

Thanks to GitHub user [andrey-jef](https://github.com/andrey-jef) for [suggesting these changes](https://github.com/oleeskild/obsidian-digital-garden/issues/4)
releases.name: Release 1.2.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description:
* Added Document Transclusion Support
* Better file and error handling
releases.name: Release 1.1.0

releases.author: oleeskild
releases.description: 🌅 First release of the Obsidian Digital Garden plugin.
releases.name: Initial Release
